components.name: Calendar
components.description: Calendar is a flexible date calendar component supporting single and multiple date selection, controlled and uncontrolled modes, and configurable display layouts (days, months, years). Quarters mode is opt-in and disabled by default (set modes.quarters: true to enable).

props.name: value
props.description: The current value (controlled).

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value (uncontrolled).

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Handler that is called when the value changes.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Whether single or multiple selection is enabled.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the element.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the field is disabled.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the calendar value is immutable.

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed date that a user may select.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed date that a user may select.

props.name: isDateUnavailable
props.description: Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.

props.name: isWeekend
props.description: Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is weekend.

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Which timezone to use to show values. Example: 'default', 'system', 'Europe/Amsterdam'.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Whether to automatically focus the calendar when it mounts.

props.name: focusedValue
props.description: Controls the currently focused date within the calendar.

props.name: defaultFocusedValue
props.description: The date that is focused when the calendar first mounts (uncontrolled).

props.name: onFocusUpdate
props.description: Handler that is called when the focused date changes.

props.name: mode
props.description: Controls what to show in calendar (days, months or years).

props.name: defaultMode
props.description: Initial mode to show in calendar (days, months or years).

props.name: onUpdateMode
props.description: Handler that is called when the mode changes.

props.name: modes
props.description: Controls which modes to use.

props.name: id
props.description: The element's unique identifier.

props.name: style
props.description: Sets inline style for the element.

props.name: className
props.description: Sets the CSS className for the element.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Handler that is called when the element receives focus.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Handler that is called when the element loses focus.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.

props.name: aria-details
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.

components.name: RangeCalendar
components.description: RangeCalendar is a calendar component for selecting a date range. It supports controlled and uncontrolled modes and shares the same layout options as Calendar.

components.name: DateField
components.description: DateField is a date input field component that allows users to enter dates by typing. Supports configurable date formats, validation, and controlled/uncontrolled modes.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value (controlled).

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value (uncontrolled).

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Handler that is called when the value changes.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the field is disabled.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the calendar value is immutable.

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed date that a user may select.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed date that a user may select.

props.name: isDateUnavailable
props.description: Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.

props.name: format
props.description: Format of the date when rendered in the input. Available formats: https://day.js.org/docs/en/display/format

props.name: placeholderValue
props.description: A placeholder date that controls the default values of each segment when the user first interacts with them.

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Which timezone to use to show values. Example: 'default', 'system', 'Europe/Amsterdam'.

props.name: parseDateFromString
props.type: (dateStr: string, format: string, timeZone?: string) => DateTime
props.description: Custom parser function for parsing pasted date strings.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the element.

props.name: pin
props.description: Corner rounding.

props.name: view
props.description: Control view.

props.name: label
props.description: Inner field label.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text that appears in the field when it has no value set.

props.name: hasClear
props.description: Show clear button.

props.name: startContent
props.description: User's node rendered before label and input.

props.name: endContent
props.description: User's node rendered after input and clear button.

props.name: validationState
props.description: Validation state.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Error message text.

props.name: errorPlacement
props.description: Error placement.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Whether the element should receive focus on render.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Handler that is called when the element receives focus.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Handler that is called when the element loses focus.

props.name: onKeyDown
props.description: Handler that is called when a key is pressed.

props.name: onKeyUp
props.description: Handler that is called when a key is released.

props.name: id
props.description: The element's unique identifier.

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the input element, used when submitting an HTML form.

props.name: form
props.description: The id of a form element in the same document.

props.name: style
props.description: Sets inline style for the element.

props.name: className
props.description: Sets the CSS className for the element.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.

components.name: RangeDateSelection
components.description: RangeDateSelection is a visual ruler-based date range selector that allows users to drag and resize a date/time range on a timeline. Supports zoom, scale buttons, and now-line display.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value (controlled).

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value (uncontrolled).

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Handler that is called when the value changes.

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed date that a user may select.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed date that a user may select.

props.name: minDuration
props.description: Minimum duration of the selection in milliseconds. Defaults to 1 second.

props.name: maxDuration
props.description: Maximum duration of the selection in milliseconds. Defaults to 15 years.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment of the selection in milliseconds. Defaults to 1 second.

props.name: placeholderValue
props.description: A placeholder date that controls the default values.

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Which timezone to use to show values.

props.name: numberOfIntervals
props.description: The number of selection intervals that fit into the underlying ruler.

props.name: placeOnRuler
props.description: Place of the selection on the underlying ruler. Value between 0 and 1.

props.name: formatTime
props.description: Formats time ticks.

props.name: displayNow
props.description: Displays now line.

props.name: draggableRuler
props.description: Enables dragging ruler.

props.name: hasScaleButtons
props.description: Displays buttons to scale selection.

props.name: scaleButtonsPosition
props.description: Position of scale buttons.

props.name: renderAdditionalRulerContent
props.description: Renders additional svg content in the ruler.

props.name: id
props.description: The element's unique identifier.

props.name: style
props.description: Sets inline style for the element.

props.name: className
props.description: Sets the CSS className for the element.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.

props.name: aria-details
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.

components.description: RelativeDateField is a text input for entering relative dates using Grafana-like format (e.g. now-1d, now/w). Shows a read-only calendar popup preview of the parsed date.

components.name: RelativeDatePicker
components.description: RelativeDatePicker is similar to DatePicker but supports both absolute and relative date modes. Switch between modes using the f(x) button. Value is a discriminated union of absolute (DateTime) and relative (string) types.

props.description: The current value (controlled). Value is { type: 'absolute'; value: DateTime } | { type: 'relative'; value: string }.

props.name: aria-details
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.

components.name: RelativeRangeDatePicker
components.description: RelativeRangeDatePicker is a comprehensive date range picker supporting both absolute and relative date values for start and end. Includes presets, timezone selection, and documentation tooltips.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value (controlled). RangeValue<Value | null> where Value is { type: 'absolute'; value: DateTime } | { type: 'relative'; value: string }.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value (uncontrolled).

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Handler that is called when the value changes.

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Which timezone to use (controlled).

props.name: defaultTimeZone
props.description: Default timezone (uncontrolled).

props.name: onUpdateTimeZone
props.description: Handler called when the timezone changes.

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed date that a user may select.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed date that a user may select.

props.name: isDateUnavailable
props.description: Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.

props.name: allowNullableValues
props.description: Allow nullable values for start/end.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the field is disabled.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the value is immutable.

props.name: format
props.description: Format of the date when rendered in the input.

props.name: placeholderValue
props.description: A placeholder date that controls the default values of each segment.

props.name: withApplyButton
props.description: Apply changes with button.

props.name: withZonesList
props.description: Show time zone selector.

props.name: withPresets
props.description: Show relative range presets.

props.name: applyPresetsImmediately
props.description: Apply presets immediately.

props.name: withHeader
props.description: Show header with docs tooltip.

props.name: presetTabs
props.description: Custom preset tabs.

props.name: docs
props.description: Custom docs for picker. If empty array, docs will be hidden.

props.name: alwaysShowAsAbsolute
props.description: Show selected relative values as absolute dates.

props.name: getRangeTitle
props.type: (value: RangeValue<Value | null> | null, timeZone: string) => string
props.description: Custom function to get range title.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Handler that is called when the popup's open state changes.

props.name: renderControl
props.description: Used to render custom control.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the element.

props.name: pin
props.description: Corner rounding.

props.name: view
props.description: Control view.

props.name: label
props.description: Inner field label.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text that appears in the field when it has no value set.

props.name: hasClear
props.description: Show clear button.

props.name: validationState
props.description: Validation state.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Error message text.

props.name: errorPlacement
props.description: Error placement.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Whether the element should receive focus on render.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Handler that is called when the element receives focus.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Handler that is called when the element loses focus.

props.name: id
props.description: The element's unique identifier.

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the input element.

props.name: form
props.description: The id of a form element in the same document.

props.name: style
props.description: Sets inline style for the element.

props.name: className
props.description: Sets the CSS className for the element.

props.name: popupClassName
props.description: Sets the CSS className for the popup element.

props.name: popupStyle
props.description: Sets the CSS style attribute for the popup element.

props.name: popupPlacement
props.description: Popup placement.

props.name: popupOffset
props.description: Popup offset relative to anchor.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.

props.name: aria-details
props.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.

hooks.name: useCalendarState
hooks.signature: function useCalendarState<M extends SelectionMode = 'single'>(props: CalendarStateOptions<CalendarValueType<M>> & { selectionMode?: M }): CalendarState<M>

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Calendar state options including value, handlers, min/max dates, timezone, focus, mode, and selection mode.

hooks.description: Manages calendar state including date selection, focus navigation, mode switching, and validation.

hooks.name: useRangeCalendarState
hooks.description: Manages range calendar state including anchor date, highlighted range, and range selection.

hooks.name: useCalendarProps
hooks.signature: function useCalendarProps(props: CalendarProps, state: CalendarState | RangeCalendarState): { calendarProps; modeButtonProps; nextButtonProps; previousButtonProps }

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Calendar state from useCalendarState or useRangeCalendarState.

hooks.return_type: { calendarProps: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>; modeButtonProps: ButtonButtonProps; nextButtonProps: ButtonButtonProps; previousButtonProps: ButtonButtonProps }
hooks.description: Returns ARIA props for the calendar container and navigation buttons (mode, previous, next).

hooks.name: useCalendarGridProps
hooks.signature: function useCalendarGridProps(state: CalendarState | RangeCalendarState): { gridProps: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement> }
hooks.description: Returns ARIA grid props and keyboard navigation handlers for the calendar grid.

hooks.name: useCalendarCellProps
hooks.signature: function useCalendarCellProps(date: DateTime, state: CalendarState | RangeCalendarState): { cellProps; buttonProps; formattedDate; isDisabled; isSelected; isRangeSelection; isSelectionStart; isSelectionEnd; isOutsideCurrentRange; isUnavailable; isCurrent; isWeekend }
hooks.return_type: { cellProps; buttonProps; formattedDate: string; isDisabled: boolean; isSelected: boolean; isRangeSelection: boolean; isSelectionStart: boolean; isSelectionEnd: boolean; isOutsideCurrentRange: boolean; isUnavailable: boolean; isCurrent: boolean; isWeekend: boolean }
hooks.description: Returns ARIA props, formatted date, and state flags for a single calendar cell.

hooks.name: useDateFieldState

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Date field options including value, format, placeholderValue, timeZone, validation.

hooks.description: Manages date field state including segment editing, validation, and value parsing.

hooks.name: useRangeDateFieldState

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Range date field options extending DateFieldBase<RangeValue<DateTime>> with optional delimiter.

hooks.description: Manages range date field state for start/end date segment editing.

hooks.name: useDateFieldProps
hooks.signature: function useDateFieldProps<T = DateTime>(state: DateFieldState<T>, props: DateFieldProps<T>): { groupProps: React.HTMLAttributes<unknown>; inputProps: TextInputProps }
hooks.description: Returns DOM props for the date field group wrapper and text input, including keyboard/focus handlers.

hooks.name: useDatePickerState

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Date picker state options extending DateFieldBase with popup trigger props.

hooks.description: Manages date picker state including value, popup open state, date/time selection.

hooks.name: useDatePickerProps
hooks.signature: function useDatePickerProps<T extends DateTime | RangeValue<DateTime>>(state: DatePickerState<T>, props: DatePickerProps<T>): InnerDatePickerProps<T>
hooks.return_type: { groupProps; fieldProps: TextInputProps; calendarButtonProps: ButtonButtonProps; popupProps: PopupProps; calendarProps: CalendarCommonProps<T>; timeInputProps: DateFieldProps<T> }
hooks.description: Returns DOM props for all date picker sub-elements: group, field, calendar button, popup, calendar, and time input.

hooks.name: useRangeDatePickerState
hooks.description: Manages range date picker state. DatePickerState<RangeValue<DateTime>>.

hooks.name: useRangeDateSelectionState

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Range date selection options including value, min/max, durations, alignment, timezone.

hooks.description: Manages ruler-based range date selection state including dragging, scaling, and viewport interval calculation.

hooks.name: useRelativeDateFieldState

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Relative date field options including value, disabled, readOnly, timeZone, roundUp.

hooks.description: Manages relative date field state including text input, parsed date, and validation.

hooks.name: useRelativeDateFieldProps
hooks.signature: function useRelativeDateFieldProps(state: RelativeDateFieldState, props: RelativeDateFieldProps): { groupProps; inputProps; popupProps; calendarProps; timeInputProps }
hooks.return_type: { groupProps: React.HTMLAttributes<unknown>; inputProps: TextInputProps; popupProps: PopupProps; calendarProps: CalendarProps; timeInputProps: DateFieldProps }
hooks.description: Returns DOM props for all relative date field sub-elements.

hooks.name: useRelativeDatePickerState

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Relative date picker state options extending DateFieldBase<Value> with roundUp.

hooks.description: Manages relative date picker state including mode switching between absolute and relative, and both sub-states.

hooks.name: useRelativeDatePickerProps
hooks.signature: function useRelativeDatePickerProps(state: RelativeDatePickerState, props: RelativeDatePickerProps): InnerRelativeDatePickerProps
hooks.return_type: { groupProps; fieldProps: TextInputProps; modeSwitcherProps: ButtonButtonProps; calendarButtonProps: ButtonButtonProps; popupProps: PopupProps; calendarProps; timeInputProps: DateFieldProps }
hooks.description: Returns DOM props for all relative date picker sub-elements including the mode switcher button.

hooks.name: useRelativeRangeDatePickerState

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Options including value, timeZone, min/max values, isDateUnavailable, allowNullableValues.

hooks.description: Manages relative range date picker state including value, timezone, validation, and error state.
